class.name: ASStateCache
class.brief_description: Circular buffer for high-performance state caching and rollback.
class.description:
ASStateCache provides optimized state management for multiplayer games requiring rollback and prediction capabilities. Uses a circular buffer to store recent state snapshots with minimal memory overhead.
Key features: - Circular buffer with configurable size (default: 128 entries) - Fast O(1) capture and restore operations - Automatic buffer management with overwrite protection - Serialization support for save/load operations - Debug utilities for state inspection
Used internally by ASComponent for high-frequency state capture during multiplayer gameplay, with fallback to ASStateSnapshot for long-term storage or save games.

method.name: capture_state
method.description: Captures the current state of the ASComponent into the cache buffer. Automatically increments tick and manages circular buffer indexing.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all cached state entries and resets the cache.

method.name: deserialize
method.description: Loads cache data from a previously serialized Array.

method.name: dump_cache
method.description: Prints detailed cache information to the console for debugging.

method.name: get_available_ticks
method.description: Returns an array of all tick numbers currently stored in the cache.

method.name: get_current_tick
method.description: Returns the current tick number of the cache.

method.name: get_used_slots
method.description: Returns the number of cache slots currently in use.

method.name: has_tick
method.description: Returns true if the cache contains an entry for the specified tick.

method.name: restore_state
method.description: Restores the ASComponent state from the cached entry at the specified tick. Returns true if successful, false if tick not found in cache.

method.name: serialize
method.description: Serializes all valid cache entries to an Array for storage.
